name: GNOME Shell Cast
description:
Cast your whole screen or a single window to a Chromecast device from the top panel, with system audio. Audio-only receivers (speakers, cast groups) are detected and offered as an audio share.

Keywords: chromecast, cast, google cast, screencast, screen mirroring, screen sharing, wireless display, tv, nest hub, speakers, hls, av1, vp9.

Copies to the clipboard only when you press "Copy command" or "Copy details" in its dialogs.

Requires the gnome-shell-cast-daemon to be installed (see the project README).
